memoryArtifacts.headline: Preserving My Version of Yves de Creil, seigneur de Bellême
memoryArtifacts.description:
I don't know why, but some people are determined to destroy this line.  It's pretty clear on geni.com how it's supposed to work.

https://www.geni.com/people/Yves-de-Creil-seigneur-de-Bell%C3%AAme/600 …

popularStory.description: His parentage is unknown but by his name he was associated with Creil, a small town in the territory belonging to Bernard, Count of Senlis. It is known that he served king Louis IV d'Outremer about 94 …

sourceList.title: Yves De Creil, "Find A Grave Index"

zh.Berd'huis, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France: 法國巴-諾門迪奧內貝爾達惠斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ives de Creil於從0940年到0942年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易可爾時，他的父親Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil42歲，母親Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu32歲。他於0969年之前與Godehild在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於0997年10月17日在法國諾門迪奧內貝爾e，埋葬在法國奧內。

zh-hans.Creil, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France: 法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易可爾
zh-hans.Berd'huis, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France: 法国巴-諾門迪奧內貝爾達惠斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ives de Creil于从0940年到0942年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易可爾时，他的父亲Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil42岁，母亲Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu32岁。他于0969年之前与Godehild在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于0997年10月17日在法国諾門迪奧內貝爾e，埋葬在法国奧內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Creil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Kriel   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Crail
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dietrich, Frieda.
Scottish: habitational name from Crail in Fife.
Americanized form of German Krail: cognate of Krauel .

nameMeanings.name: Ives
meanings: Brenton, Cornish: God's grace or God's gift

en.lifeSummary: When Ives de Creil was born from 0940 to 0942, in Creil, Oise, Picardie, France, his father, Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil, was 42 and his mother, Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu, was 32. He married Godehild before 0969, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 October 0997, in Bellême, Orne, Normandy, France, and was buried in Orne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ives de Creil est né du 0940 au 0942, à Creil, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Godehild avant 0969, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 0997, à Bellême, Orne, Normandie, France, et a été enterré à Orne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ives de Creil von 0940 bis 0942 in Creil, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil 42 und seine Mutter Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu 32. Er hat vor 0969 in Frankreich Godehild geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Oktober 0997 in Bellême, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Orne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ives de Creil è nato il da 0940 a 0942 nel Creil, Oise, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Godehild prima del 0969, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 ottobre 0997, nel Bellême, Orne, Normandie, Francia, e fu sepolto a Orne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ives de Creilがから0940年まで0942年にフランスピカーディオイゼクレイルで生まれた時，父Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creilは42歳，母Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieuは32歳であった。0969年以前にフランスでGodehildと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は0997年10月17日にフランスノーマンディオルンベルeメで死去し，フランスオルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ives de Creil(이)가 0940년 부터 0942년 까지 프랑스 피카디 이스 크레일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu(은)는 32세였다. 그는 0969년 이전 프랑스에서 Godehild(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0997년 10월 17일 프랑스 노먼디 른 브e에서 사망했으며 프랑스 른에 묻혔다.

lv.from 0940 to 0942–17 OCT 997: no 0940. gada līdz 0942. gadam–0997. gada 17. oktobris

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ives de Creil nasceu de 0940 a 0942, em Creil, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Godehild antes 0969, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 0997, em Bellême, Orne, Normandie, França, e foi sepultado em Orne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ives de Creil родился с 0940 по 0942 в местности крил, оис, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Godehild перед 0969 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 октября 0997 г. в местности беллeм, орн, норманди, Франция и был похоронен в местности орн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ives de Creil nació desde 0940 hasta 0942, en Creil, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Fulcuin de Carbonais de Creil, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Geile “The Venerable” de Ponthieu, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Godehild antes de 0969, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de octubre de 0997, en Bellême, Orne, Normandie, Francia, y fue sepultado en Orne, Francia.
